option.name: filePath
option.value: /MainActivity (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <path android:fillColor="@android:color/white" android:pathData="M19,13h-6v6h-2v-6H5v-2h6V5h2v6h6v2z"/> </vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <path android:fillColor="@android:color/white" android:pathData="M20,11H7.83l5.59,-5.59L12,4l-8,8 8,8 1.41,-1.41L7.83,13H20v-2z"/> </vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <path android:fillColor="@android:color/white" android:pathData="M20,2H4C2.9,2 2,2.9 2,4v18l4,-4h14c1.1,0 2,-0.9 2,-2V4C22,2.9 21.1,2 20,2zM20,16H5.2L4,17.2V4h16V16z"/> </vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <path android:fillColor="@android:color/white" android:pathData="M13,3c-4.97,0 -9,4.03 -9,9H1l3.89,3.89 0.07,0.14L9,12H6c0,-3.87 3.13,-7 7,-7s7,3.13 7,7 -3.13,7 -7,7c-1.93,0 -3.68,-0.79 -4.94,-2.06l-1.42,1.42C8.27,19.99 10.51,21 13,21c4.97,0 9,-4.03 9,-9s-4.03,-9 -9,-9zM12,8v5l4.28,2.54 0.72,-1.21 -3.5,-2.08V8H12z"/> </vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" tools:context=".ChatHistoryActivity">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/headerSection" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@color/primary_container" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<!-- Back button --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_back" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_back" app:tint="@color/on_primary_container" />
<ImageView android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="32dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_history" android:contentDescription="@string/chat_history_title" app:tint="@color/primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:text="@string/chat_history_title" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/on_primary_container" />
<!-- Clear all button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnClearAll" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="@string/btn_clear_all" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/error" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Empty state --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/emptyState" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/headerSection">
<ImageView android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_chat" android:alpha="0.3" app:tint="@color/on_surface_variant" android:contentDescription="@string/no_chat_history" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/no_chat_history" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/no_chat_history_desc" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" android:alpha="0.7" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Chat history list --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvChatHistory" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingVertical="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnNewChat" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/headerSection" tools:listitem="@layout/item_chat_history" />
<!-- New Chat FAB --> <com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.ExtendedFloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/btnNewChat" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:text="@string/btn_new_chat" app:icon="@drawable/ic_add" app:backgroundTint="@color/primary" app:iconTint="@color/on_primary" android:textColor="@color/on_primary" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- App Header Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/headerSection" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@color/primary_container" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<ImageView android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_robot" android:contentDescription="@string/content_desc_ai" app:tint="@color/primary" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="12dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/on_primary_container" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvModelPath" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/model_not_loaded" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_primary_container" android:alpha="0.8" android:ellipsize="middle" android:singleLine="true" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Chat history button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHistory" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.IconButton" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_history" app:iconTint="@color/on_primary_container" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_chat_history" />
<!-- Clear chat button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnClearChat" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.IconButton" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_delete" app:iconTint="@color/on_primary_container" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_clear_chat" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnModels" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TonalButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="@string/btn_models" android:textSize="12sp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_folder" app:iconSize="18dp" app:cornerRadius="20dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Status Chips Row --> <HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/statusScrollView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:scrollbars="none" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingVertical="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/headerSection">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/llStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Timer Chip --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/status_chip_background" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_timer" android:contentDescription="@string/content_desc_timer" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvGenTimer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="@string/status_timer_default" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- RAM Chip --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/status_chip_background" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_memory" android:contentDescription="@string/content_desc_ram" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvRamUsage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="@string/status_ram_default" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- CPU/System Chip --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/status_chip_background" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_cpu" android:contentDescription="@string/content_desc_cpu" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSysUsage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="@string/status_cpu_default" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<!-- Main Content Container --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/outputContainer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/inputContainer" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/statusScrollView">
<!-- GPU Usage Banner (optional) --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvGpuUsage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/status_chip_background" android:padding="8dp" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:visibility="gone" android:maxLines="2" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<!-- Chat History RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvChat" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="3" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingVertical="8dp" tools:listitem="@layout/item_chat_ai" />
<!-- Hidden tvOutput for backward compatibility --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvOutput" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- Hidden scrollOutput for backward compatibility --> <ScrollView android:id="@+id/scrollOutput" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:visibility="gone"> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" /> </ScrollView>
<!-- AI Log Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/logContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@drawable/log_panel_background" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:padding="2dp">
<!-- Log Header with compound drawable --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvLogHeader" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/log_header" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/log_text" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:paddingVertical="8dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_terminal" android:drawablePadding="8dp" />
<!-- Log Content --> <ScrollView android:id="@+id/scrollLog" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:clipToPadding="false">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvLog" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textIsSelectable="true" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/log_text" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.3" /> </ScrollView> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Input Container - Fixed at bottom --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/inputContainer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@color/surface" android:elevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<EditText android:id="@+id/etPrompt" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:hint="@string/hint_prompt" android:inputType="textMultiLine" android:minLines="1" android:maxLines="4" android:background="@drawable/input_background" android:textColor="@color/on_surface" android:textColorHint="@color/on_surface_variant" android:textSize="15sp" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:importantForAutofill="no" tools:ignore="LabelFor" />
<!-- Generate Button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGenerate" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_send" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:backgroundTint="@color/primary" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_generate" />
<!-- Stop Button (hidden by default) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnStop" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_stop" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:backgroundTint="@color/error" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_stop" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- App Header Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/headerSection" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@color/primary_container" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<ImageView android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_robot" android:contentDescription="@string/content_desc_ai" app:tint="@color/primary" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="12dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/on_primary_container" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvModelPath" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/model_not_loaded" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_primary_container" android:alpha="0.8" android:ellipsize="middle" android:singleLine="true" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Chat history button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHistory" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.IconButton" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_history" app:iconTint="@color/on_primary_container" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_chat_history" />
<!-- Clear chat button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnClearChat" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.IconButton" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_delete" app:iconTint="@color/on_primary_container" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_clear_chat" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnModels" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TonalButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="@string/btn_models" android:textSize="12sp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_folder" app:iconSize="18dp" app:cornerRadius="20dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Status Chips Row --> <HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/statusScrollView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:scrollbars="none" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingVertical="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/headerSection">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/llStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Timer Chip --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/status_chip_background" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_timer" android:contentDescription="@string/content_desc_timer" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvGenTimer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="@string/status_timer_default" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- RAM Chip --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/status_chip_background" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_memory" android:contentDescription="@string/content_desc_ram" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvRamUsage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="@string/status_ram_default" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- CPU/System Chip --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/status_chip_background" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_cpu" android:contentDescription="@string/content_desc_cpu" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSysUsage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="@string/status_cpu_default" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<!-- Main Content Container --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/outputContainer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/inputContainer" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/statusScrollView">
<!-- GPU Usage Banner (optional) --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvGpuUsage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/status_chip_background" android:padding="8dp" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:visibility="gone" android:maxLines="2" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<!-- Chat History RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvChat" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="3" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingVertical="8dp" tools:listitem="@layout/item_chat_ai" />
<!-- Hidden tvOutput for backward compatibility --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvOutput" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- Hidden scrollOutput for backward compatibility --> <ScrollView android:id="@+id/scrollOutput" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:visibility="gone"> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" /> </ScrollView>
<!-- AI Log Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/logContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@drawable/log_panel_background" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:padding="2dp">
<!-- Log Header with compound drawable --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvLogHeader" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/log_header" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/log_text" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:paddingVertical="8dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_terminal" android:drawablePadding="8dp" />
<!-- Log Content --> <ScrollView android:id="@+id/scrollLog" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:clipToPadding="false">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvLog" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textIsSelectable="true" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/log_text" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.3" /> </ScrollView> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Input Container - Fixed at bottom --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/inputContainer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingVertical="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@color/surface" android:elevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<EditText android:id="@+id/etPrompt" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:hint="@string/hint_prompt" android:inputType="textMultiLine|textCapSentences" android:imeOptions="actionSend" android:minLines="1" android:maxLines="4" android:background="@drawable/input_background" android:textColor="@color/on_surface" android:textColorHint="@color/on_surface_variant" android:textSize="15sp" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:importantForAutofill="no" android:scrollbars="vertical" tools:ignore="LabelFor" />
<!-- Generate Button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGenerate" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_send" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:backgroundTint="@color/primary" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_generate" />
<!-- Stop Button (hidden by default) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnStop" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_stop" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:backgroundTint="@color/error" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_stop" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginVertical="6dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/card_background" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Chat icon --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivChatIcon" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_chat" android:padding="8dp" android:background="@drawable/status_chip_background" app:tint="@color/primary" android:contentDescription="@string/content_desc_chat" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Preview text --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvSessionPreview" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:textSize="15sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface" android:textStyle="bold" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/btnDeleteSession" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/ivChatIcon" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Date --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvSessionDate" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/ivChatIcon" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSessionPreview" />
<!-- Message count --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvMessageCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/on_surface_variant" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/tvSessionDate" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSessionPreview" app:layout_constraintBaseline_toBaselineOf="@id/tvSessionDate" />
<!-- Delete button --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnDeleteSession" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_delete" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/btn_delete_session" app:tint="@color/error" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">OnDevice AI</string> <string name="hint_prompt">Ask me anything…</string> <string name="btn_load_model">Load Model</string> <string name="btn_generate">Generate</string> <string name="btn_stop">Stop</string> <string name="default_output">AI response will appear here…</string> <string name="model_not_loaded">No model loaded</string> <string name="model_loaded">Model: %s</string> <string name="btn_select_model">Select Model</string> <string name="btn_models">Models</string> <string name="btn_clear_chat">Clear chat</string> <string name="status_timer">Time: %s</string> <string name="status_timer_default">0.0s</string> <string name="status_ram">RAM: %s</string> <string name="status_ram_default">RAM: --</string> <string name="status_cpu">CPU: %s</string> <string name="status_cpu_default">CPU: --</string> <string name="status_gpu">GPU: %s</string> <string name="log_header">AI Log</string> <string name="app_subtitle">On-Device Language Model</string> <string name="content_desc_ai">AI Assistant</string> <string name="content_desc_timer">Timer</string> <string name="content_desc_ram">RAM Usage</string> <string name="content_desc_cpu">CPU Usage</string> <string name="content_desc_log">Log Terminal</string> <string name="chat_cleared">Chat history cleared</string> <string name="confirm_clear_chat">Clear all chat history?</string> <string name="yes">Yes</string> <string name="no">No</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">OnDevice AI</string> <string name="hint_prompt">Ask me anything…</string> <string name="btn_load_model">Load Model</string> <string name="btn_generate">Generate</string> <string name="btn_stop">Stop</string> <string name="default_output">AI response will appear here…</string> <string name="model_not_loaded">No model loaded</string> <string name="model_loaded">Model: %s</string> <string name="btn_select_model">Select Model</string> <string name="btn_models">Models</string> <string name="btn_clear_chat">Clear chat</string> <string name="status_timer">Time: %s</string> <string name="status_timer_default">0.0s</string> <string name="status_ram">RAM: %s</string> <string name="status_ram_default">RAM: --</string> <string name="status_cpu">CPU: %s</string> <string name="status_cpu_default">CPU: --</string> <string name="status_gpu">GPU: %s</string> <string name="log_header">AI Log</string> <string name="app_subtitle">On-Device Language Model</string> <string name="content_desc_ai">AI Assistant</string> <string name="content_desc_timer">Timer</string> <string name="content_desc_ram">RAM Usage</string> <string name="content_desc_cpu">CPU Usage</string> <string name="content_desc_log">Log Terminal</string> <string name="content_desc_chat">Chat</string> <string name="chat_cleared">Chat history cleared</string> <string name="confirm_clear_chat">Clear all chat history?</string> <string name="yes">Yes</string> <string name="no">No</string>
<!-- Chat History --> <string name="chat_history_title">Chat History</string> <string name="btn_chat_history">History</string> <string name="btn_back">Back</string> <string name="btn_clear_all">Clear All</string> <string name="btn_delete_session">Delete chat</string> <string name="btn_new_chat">New Chat</string> <string name="no_chat_history">No chat history</string> <string name="no_chat_history_desc">Your conversations will appear here</string> <string name="confirm_delete_session">Delete this conversation?</string> <string name="confirm_clear_all_history">Delete all chat history? This cannot be undone.</string> <string name="session_deleted">Conversation deleted</string> <string name="all_history_deleted">All history deleted</string> </resources>
